raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Proposition 47 effectively decriminalized drug use and minimized the consequences of theft by eliminating felony penalties for theft under $950.",
    "In Los Angeles County, reported shoplifting incidents are up 61% in the last 4 years.",
    "From mid-2019 through mid-2023, reported shoplifting incidents in Los Angeles increased 61%, the second largest increase in the nation.",
    "Retailers estimate losses of $112 billion due to retail theft.",
    "The cost of the losses and increased insurance costs are passed to consumers in the form of higher prices.",
    "Almost 81% of respondents to a national retail security survey said that criminals behind organized retail theft were more aggressive and violent compared to just one year ago."
  ]
}
```
